title: dipteryx odorata
intro: Dipteryx odorata, also known as tonka bean, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Dipteryx odorata lie in its seed, which contains a compound called coumarin, responsible for its distinctive fragrance and aroma. The health benefits of tonka bean include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and have anti-inflammatory properties. Tonka bean is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, and is also used as a flavoring agent in perfumes, cosmetics, and food products.
